case_title: ALITHEA MORASCA VS. JOSEPH KO et al

docket_entries.description: ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-03-2003 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
TRIAL DE NOVO FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORASCA, ALITHEA
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT KO, JOSEPH ALSO FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORASCA, ALITHEA
ARBITRATOR JON HOLDEN YORK APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION NOV-04-2002 THROUGH FEB-02-2003.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORASCA, ALITHEA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KO, JOSEPH $1,750.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,750.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR OCT-21-2002. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR DEC-02-2002 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. AUG-16-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
